Skill Path: Operative

Your specialty are covert operations in enemy territory.

While developing your skills in Stealth you chose to focus specifically on Operative, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.N7IsnLDFt73r7x56]{Shadow Mark}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.t3btih0O5RUwWynt]{Experienced Smuggler}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qVNVSmsgpKFGk9hV]{Conceal an Object}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.N7IsnLDFt73r7x56]{Shadow Mark}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.t3btih0O5RUwWynt]{Experienced Smuggler}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.pekKtubQTkG9m1xK]{Quiet Allies}
  • Master: choose one of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IJQJBnD5CjKvFYEx]{Foil Senses}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Imvu2RV2ggjJ2HZt]{Swift Sneak}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.n0urrOL8YlnVBVRQ]{Legendary Sneak}
